tasks.name: Clear Pacman Cache
tasks.description: Removes old versions of installed packages, keeping the most recent versions.

tasks.name: Remove Orphan Packages
tasks.description: Finds and removes packages that were installed as dependencies but are no longer required.
tasks.size_command: pacman -Qtdq | pacman -Qi - | awk '{if ($1 == "Installed") sum+=$4} END {if (sum > 1024) printf "%.1f MB", sum/1024; else if (sum > 0) printf "%.1f KB", sum; else print "0 MB"}'

tasks.name: Remove Unused Flatpak Runtimes
tasks.description: Automated removal of heavy libraries no longer used by any installed Flatpaks.

tasks.name: Shader Cache Purge
tasks.description: Clears stale GPU shader caches (NVIDIA, Mesa) to prevent stuttering after driver updates.

tasks.name: Pacman Keyring Repair
tasks.description: Initializes and populates the Pacman keyring, then refreshes keys to fix signature errors.

tasks.name: Pacman Sync Databases
tasks.description: Synchronizes the local package database with the remote repositories.

tasks.name: Pacman Rank Mirrors
tasks.description: Uses reflector to rank and save the fastest HTTPS mirrors to /etc/pacman.d/mirrorlist.

tasks.name: Corpse Cleaner
tasks.description: Scans ~/.config, ~/.local/share, ~/.local/bin and custom paths for leftover directories from uninstalled applications.
